🔥 Top Stories

📊 Markets & Macro

• Rates/curve pressure persists — JGB yields climb; gold stabilizes after sharp drop as Fed path stays restrictive

🌍 Geopolitical
• Ukraine war drags on — explosions in Kyiv, Russian drone barrages, and Zelenskiy pushes for more U.S./EU pressure on Putin
